content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, atom 13 (Oxygen) is covalently connected to the following neighbor atoms:

- Atom 11 (Carbon, C)
- Atom 14 (Hydrogen, H)

The geomconf_index is 4132.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 13 (element: O). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
